arts.ttl: Aston Villa star opens up on the Tyrone Mings effect and yet another Unai Emery meeting
arts.sum: Matty Cash has revealed Tyrone Mings has been impressing in training ahead of his return to action for Aston Villa. We will be sending the latest breaking news and top Villa stories directly to the WhatsApp community and we want you to be part of it.

arts.ttl: Working in Italy, Iling-Junior exit and Liverpool warning - Unai Emery’s Bologna press conference - Birmingham Live
arts.sum: After the win at Fulham, tomorrow is the new challenge to try to keep the same mentality, performance and preparation for the match. We started well and we played before the break very well in the Champions League and won two games but to get the balance is the most important.

arts.ttl: Emery: Villa want titles, not here to waste time
arts.sum: Aston Villa head coach Unai Emery has insisted his team are ready to compete for major silverware as they prepare to host Bologna in their third UEFA Champions League game of the season.

arts.ttl: What Unai Emery is 'massive on' as Matty Cash makes exciting Aston Villa admission
arts.sum: Cash joined the club in the summer of 2020 from Nottingham Forest and never expected to be playing in Europe's elite club competition with Villa when he signed. Matty Cash admits Aston Villa have come a long way in a short space of time and claims the club has "no ceiling".

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs. Bologna: Champions League rotation a possibility, hints Unai Emery
arts.sum: Aston Villa head coach Unai Emery hints that he will give strong consideration to squad rotation for Tuesday's Champions League fixture against Bologna.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery sets sights on silverware as Aston Villa continue to ‘break barriers’
arts.sum: Emery’s side face Bologna in their third Champions League game of the campaign

arts.ttl: Unai Emery issues 'waste my time' warning as Aston Villa ambitions made clear
arts.sum: Unai Emery insists Aston Villa must continue to strive to "break barriers" as the club look to take a big step towards qualifying for the Champions League knockout stages on Tuesday. "We love football, we love our work and we want to be successful and one of them is Champions League," Emery said in his press conference.
